name: Scholar
description: Scientists, researchers, and physicians. Those who pursue knowledge for its own sake or apply it to heal the sick.

field_researcher.name: Field Researcher
field_researcher.description: You conduct research in the field, studying alien worlds, cultures or phenomena.

scientist.name: Scientist
scientist.description: You work in a lab advancing the frontiers of human knowledge.

physician.name: Physician
physician.description: You care for the sick and injured.

mishaps.1: Severely injured (treat as a result of 2 on the Injury Table). Alternatively, roll twice on the Injury Table and take the lower result.
mishaps.2: One of your experiments goes disastrously wrong. Reduce one physical characteristic by 1 and lose your Benefit rolls from this term.
mishaps.3: Your research is discredited — you may have committed fraud, or simply been unlucky. Lose 1 SOC and gain a Rival.
mishaps.4: A patient, subject, or colleague dies as a result of your work. Gain an Enemy among their family or colleagues.
mishaps.5: Your funding is pulled or your institution disbands your department. You must muster out.
mishaps.6: Injured. Roll on the Injury Table.

events.2: Disaster! Roll on the Mishap Table, but you are not ejected from this career.
events.3: A research expedition goes wrong. Roll Survival 8+ or Medic 8+; on success, gain one level in that skill. On failure, lose 1 END.
events.4: You take part in a major interdisciplinary project. Gain one of Science 1, Engineer 1, Medic 1 or Electronics 1.
events.5: You present a paper or give a lecture that is well-received. Gain DM+1 to any one Benefit roll.
events.6: You make a valuable Contact in academia, industry, or government.
events.7: Life Event. Roll on the Life Events Table.
events.8: You are given specialised training or fellowship. Roll EDU 8+ to gain one level in any Science specialty of your choice.
events.9: A rival researcher tries to scoop your work. Roll INT 8+ to publish first; on success, gain DM+2 to your next Advancement. On failure, gain a Rival.
events.10: Your research or practice attracts the notice of a powerful patron. Gain an Ally and DM+2 to your next Advancement check.
events.11: You are invited to join a major institution or expedition. Either gain one level of Admin, Advocate or Diplomat, or DM+4 to your next Advancement roll.
events.12: Your work is of Imperial significance — a breakthrough, discovery or cure. You are automatically promoted and gain DM+2 to any one Benefit roll.
